<features>
- coat color: black and tan
- ear shape: erect, pointed
- body size: small
- tail: short, docked or naturally short and curled
</features>
<kb>
- IF [coat color = black and tan AND ear shape = erect, pointed AND body size = small] THEN [21]
- IF [coat color = predominantly white or cream AND fur texture = long and fluffy AND tail = long and fluffy] THEN [15]
- IF [coat color = predominantly white or cream with some darker markings on face/ears/tail AND fur texture = long and fluffy AND eye color = blue] THEN [26]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The rule for class 21 fires because the Query Image shows a dog with a black and tan coat, erect and pointed ears, and a small body size.
</rule_check>
<response>21</response>

<features>
- animal type: cat
- fur length: long and fluffy
- fur color: predominantly white with some light brown/grey markings on face, ears, and tail
- eye color: blue
- nose color: pink
- body posture: sitting upright
</features>
<kb>
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur length = short AND fur color = black and tan OR fur color = brown] THEN [21]
- IF [animal type = cat AND fur length = long and fluffy AND fur color = predominantly white with some light brown/grey markings AND eye color = blue] THEN [26]
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur length = long and fluffy AND fur color = predominantly white] THEN [15]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The rule for class 26 fires because the Query Image shows a cat with long and fluffy fur, predominantly white fur with light brown/grey markings, and blue eyes. These features are consistent with the examples provided for class 26.
</rule_check>
<response>26</response>
